message:
test(fcp-protocol/session): responder-picks regression tests (br-crkft.3)

Adds 4 regression tests that lock in the responder-picks invariant
flipped in crkft.2. Future refactors that silently regress the
semantics will break these tests.

Tests:
- negotiate_suite_responder_wins_on_multi_suite_overlap: both peers
  support both; responder's first-preferred wins
- negotiate_suite_no_overlap_returns_none: basic None case
- negotiate_suite_ignores_initiator_order_preference: initiator's
  ordering is irrelevant
- negotiate_suite_malicious_initiator_cannot_downgrade: threat-model
  documentation test (currently fictional because no weak option exists,
  but becomes live when a future suite deprecates one of the existing
  two)

Property: initiator ordering does not dictate outcome.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
